sections.paragraph:
verb חוור

be explained, elucidated

verb להחויר (>>להחוויר)

to pale, turn pale; make pale

masculine noun

hole, aperture, cavity, hollow, bore, cranny, foramen, hiatus, leak, washout ; eye-socket

adjective חור (>>חיוור)

pale, colorless, pallid, white, wan, sallow, washy, ashen, bloodless, whitelivered
